# Repository metadata

These values are applied via the GitHub UI (repo settings → "About"), not
through committed code. Captured here so they survive and stay consistent
across forks or re-creates.

## Description (GitHub "About" field — 350 character limit)

```
Deterministic git diff analyzer that maps changed files to risk areas using path-based heuristics. Fast, reproducible, no AI.
```

## Topics

```
go cli git static-analysis developer-tools sre risk-analysis code-review
```

Apply via **Settings → General → Topics** or with the GitHub CLI:

```sh
gh repo edit --description "Deterministic git diff analyzer that maps changed files to risk areas using path-based heuristics. Fast, reproducible, no AI." \
             --add-topic go \
             --add-topic cli \
             --add-topic git \
             --add-topic static-analysis \
             --add-topic developer-tools \
             --add-topic sre \
             --add-topic risk-analysis \
             --add-topic code-review
```
